check: Dimensions: length, breadth, depth as per drawing.
Check is the bar bending schedule is prepared and approved by the site Engineer.
Check for correct cutting & bending of bars as per approved BBS.
Check bar diameter, shapes of bar, dimension of bars & number of bars as per BBS.
Check for cleanliness of bars from any oil, grease, soil & rust.
Check for satisfactory tying of reinforcement with binding wire.
Check for location of service conduits.
Check for readiness of reinforcement for release for concreting.
Is continuous flow of concrete ensured.
Check for transportation & placement of concrete. Is it ok?
Check whether vibration being done till concrete packs tightly against all surface, reinforcement and embedments.
Is blending of concrete poured in separated layers being ensured?
Is concrete consumed within initial setting time of cement.
Check for positions of construction joint. Is it ok?
Check for leveling and finishing of concrete surface.
Check the quantity of concrete of poured match with theoretical qty.
Check the start time and end time of concreting.
Cleaning of formwork (no debris, dust, water).
Bar diameter, number & spacing as per BBS.
Cover blocks (cement / PVC) — type, size, spacing.
Site clearance — debris, weeds, construction waste.
Plant species list — match approved schedule.
Pit size for trees / shrubs / hedges.
Plant survival rate during defects period.

Dimensions: length, breadth, depth as per drawing.
Check is the bar bending schedule is prepared and approved by the site Engineer.
Check for correct cutting & bending of bars as per approved BBS.
Check bar diameter, shapes of bar, dimension of bars & number of bars as per BBS.
Check whether soil investigation report/drawing studied by concerned Consultant.
Is excavation plan approved by Engineer/Consultant.
Check the layout, Alignment and size of excavation marked on the ground as per excavation plan.
Check Is there any underground utilities like sewers,water pipeline, cable etc is exist.
Check the area on excavation is clean & clear of bushes, vegetation & tree.
Check whether the excavated pit are adequately shored/timbered/safe slopes provided.
Check where barricading & Caution signs are provided for deep excavation.
Check whether excavated material is kept away at least 1.5 mtr from the edge of the pit.
Make sure to keep away heavy equipment atleast 6.00 mtr from the pit.
Check lighting arrangement are adequate during night work.
Check the dewatering arrangement is available in case of pit is water logged.
Isolation valves at branches & before fixtures.
Floor traps & nahani trap — level with floor finish.
Fixture brand, model, color as approved.
WC / wash basin / urinal fixing — level, firm.

check: MEP services above ceiling completed & tested.
Approved shop drawing with grid pattern.
Gypsum board / calcium silicate — brand, thickness.
GI sections — perimeter channel, intermediate, ceiling section.
Suspension — soffit cleats, GI rods, hangers.
Cut-outs for lights, AC grills, sprinklers.

Check whether type and material for Masonry work has been decided.
Check for availability of material as per the daily requirement.
Check is the area clean of loose material and concrete.

Fire NOC / approved drawings on site.
Pipe material — MS heavy / GI as specified.
Sprinkler heads — type, K-factor, temp rating.
Diesel engine pump — fuel tank, battery.
Suction / delivery — gauges, NRV, gate valve.
Flow & pressure test at remotest hydrant.

MCP (manual call point) — tested every floor.
